# CWE-289 — Authentication Bypass by Alternate Name (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-289-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

// Safe: matches canonical principal id including realm suffix.
func LookupPrincipal(c *gin.Context, db *sqlx.DB) {
	who := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(c.Query("user")))
	var count int
	err := db.Get(&count, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM principals WHERE canonical_name = ?", who)
	if err != nil || count == 0 {
		c.JSON(401, gin.H{"error": "unknown principal"})
		return
	}
	c.Set("authenticated", true)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
